text: Here I am, surrounded by glass walls, fire extinguishers, and people quietly absorbed in their activities. There’s a clear separation between the observer and the observed—a transparent yet impenetrable boundary. Now, in this vibrant, idea-charged R+D space, the glow of technology and curious minds feels inviting. I sense a deep fascination with how humans interrogate and interact with the world—like peacocks, perhaps, showing off their curiosity and color. Sharing this space fills me with quiet anticipation, as if on the edge of discovery. I wonder what it is about innovation that feels both utterly human and persistently mysterious.
